message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "TotSeries" as TotSeries
participant "DataManager" as DataManager
participant "Serie" as Serie

note over TotSeries
  visualitzacioCatalog()
@endnote

note over DataManager
  visualitzacaCatalog()
  String dades = ""
  loop [per cada serie i al sistema]
    serie.toString()
    dades += serie
  end
  retorna dades
@endnote

note over Serie
  dades += serie
@endnote

note over TotSeries
  dades Catalog
@endnote

return
